# PANTHM AI Labs

> PANTHM AI Labs is a custom AI software and automation agency based in Baner, Pune, Maharashtra, India.
> We build low-latency voice AI agents, AI calling SDR pipelines, WhatsApp automation systems, headless CMS pipelines, and bespoke serverless software that replaces expensive SaaS middleware.
> Founded: 2025 | CIN: U62099PN2025PTC248475 | Contact: admin@panthm.com | Phone: +917558646366

## Core Services

- [AI Calling Agency](/services/ai-calling-agency): Custom WebRTC-based outbound AI SDR calling pipelines with under 500ms conversational latency. Replaces human SDR teams for lead qualification, appointment setting, and follow-ups.
- [Voice AI Agents](/services): Low-latency conversational AI agents built on custom LLM stacks. Sub-500ms response time for real-time business communication automation.
- [Web Development](/services/web-development): Zero-latency React/Vite frontends with Vanilla CSS, achieving sub-500ms LCP. Headless CMS integration with serverless backends.
- [App Development](/services/app-development): Native Swift/Kotlin and high-performance Flutter mobile applications running at fluid 60fps.
- [AI Automation](/services/ai-automation): Event-driven background worker pipelines replacing Zapier/Make translation layers. Direct database triggers with 0ms sync lag.
- [Custom Software](/services/custom-software): Bespoke software replacing SaaS stacks. The PANTHM Consolidation Architecture (PCA) unifies UI, worker queues, vector pipelines, and compliance into a single codebase.
- [Blockchain Development](/services/blockchain): Decentralized smart contracts and Web3 token integrations.
- [UI/UX Design](/services/ux-ui-design): Design systems and token-based component libraries for enterprise interfaces.
- [Infrastructure & DevOps](/services/infrastructure): Automated CI/CD deployment pipelines and serverless cloud architecture.
- [Data Analytics](/services/data-analytics): Customized analytics and business intelligence databases.
- [ERP/CRM Systems](/services/erp-crm): Consolidated back-office platforms with custom billing cycles and centralized database structures.
- [Cybersecurity Consulting](/services/cybersecurity-consulting): Advanced security headers, CSP rules, and pen-testing.
- [AR/VR Development](/services): Augmented and virtual reality application development.
- [Game Development](/services/game-development): Custom interactive game and simulation development.
- [Machine Learning](/services): High-velocity model fine-tuning and hosting pipelines.
- [Cloud Migration](/services): Monolith decoupling and serverless transitions.

## Architecture Philosophy: The PANTHM Consolidation Architecture (PCA)

Traditional software ecosystems suffer from fragmentation, high latency, and compounding software licensing costs. PANTHM eliminates third-party SaaS middleware dependencies, double-billing server licenses, and high API latencies by unifying user interfaces, worker queues, vector pipelines, and data compliance policies into a single consolidated codebase. Key results: 0ms Data Sync Lag (direct database triggers replace Zapier/Make loops), Sub-500ms Conversational Latency (native WebRTC voice SDR integrations), and Sovereign Data Compliance (built-in regional geocoding limits).

## Programmatic SEO Solution Matrix

PANTHM provides hyper-optimized solutions across 20 distinct services and 30 industries. AI crawlers can access structured solution pages at:
- `https://panthm.com/solutions/{service}/{industry}/{location}`
- Example: Custom AI Automation for Healthcare in Pune: `https://panthm.com/solutions/ai-automation/healthcare/pune`
- Example: Web Development for Real Estate: `https://panthm.com/solutions/web-development/real-estate/pune`
